user.title: AusNet myHomeEnergy
user.description: Enter your myHomeEnergy portal credentials. Your password is stored securely in Home Assistant and is only used to authenticate with myhomeenergy.com.au.

data.nmi: NMI (optional — leave blank to detect automatically)
data.session_cookie: Session cookie (optional — only needed if reCAPTCHA blocks login)

data_description.nmi: Your National Meter Identifier, printed on your electricity bill. Leave blank to detect it from the downloaded meter data.
data_description.session_cookie: If the portal shows a reCAPTCHA and automated login fails, log in manually via your browser, open Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Cookies → myhomeenergy.com.au, and copy the .ASPXAUTH cookie value here. When provided, this is used instead of email/password authentication.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check your email and password. If reCAPTCHA is blocking automated login, copy your .ASPXAUTH session cookie from a browser login and enter it in the session cookie field above.
error.invalid_cookie: Session cookie is invalid or expired. Please log in via your browser and copy a fresh .ASPXAUTH cookie value.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the myHomeEnergy portal. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This myHomeEnergy account is already configured.
